name: El Norte Salvaje, Juego De Cartas RPG
short_description: The Wild North, RPG card game, is a card game with a medieval and fantasy theme for one player in which we control a hero who has at his disposal a deck of nj cards that he will use to advance overcoming different scenarios until completing the campaign map.
detailed_description:
THE WILD NORTH, RPG CARD GAME

The Wild North, RPG card game, is a card game with a medieval and fantasy theme for one player in which we manage a hero who has at his disposal a reduced deck of cards of njs. The hero has his own abilities and inventory and will use the cards in the deck to advance through different scenarios until completing the campaign map.

You can see the different guides in the following link:

Included in version 1.2:

- Campaign with 55 scenarios and a plot line.
- Warrior, Forester or Mage as main characters.
- Inventory.
- Three warrior skills, two Ranger skills, and two Forester runes, four Mages rumes.
- Eight cards that make up the Warrior-specific deck, eight cards from the Forester-specific deck and eight cards from the Mage-specific deck. Cards are obtained by rescuing them from their captors, by leveling up, or by visiting certain locations. The cards in the deck are not tradeable.
- Skills both on the cards in the deck and on many enemies.
- Several scenarios are events which we will have to figure out the best way to deal with.
- Level up.
- Stores.
- Translate to Spanish/English.
- Autosave at the beginning of each new scenario.
- Steam achievements.

Roadmap

- Complete campaign against the orcs.
- Crusade game mode. Deck building, ingame card improvements...
